task_completion.description: Verify that a dental implant has been placed in the lower right first molar site (tooth #30).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cross-sectional view in Blue Sky Plan showing a digital dental implant placed into the mandibular bone.

task_completion.description: Verify that a measurement ruler is documenting the distance between the implant apex and the nerve.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A native software measurement line drawn from the bottom tip (apex) of the implant to the inferior alveolar nerve canal.

task_completion.description: Verify that the safety distance is strictly maintained at a minimum of 2.0 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement ruler on the screen explicitly displays a numerical value of 2.0 mm or greater.

task_completion.description: Verify that the cross-section screenshot was saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window, save dialog, or image viewer showing 'implant_safety_check.png' located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the text file was saved with the correct format and data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file explorer showing 'implant_plan_data.txt' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\' containing the exact keys: 'Available_Bone_Height_mm', 'Selected_Implant_Length_mm', and 'Final_Safety_Gap_mm' with corresponding numerical values.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Blue Sky Plan software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the genuine Blue Sky Plan GUI with loaded DICOM/CBCT data, not a web browser, mock interface, or static image.

integrity.description: Ensure the measurement was made using the software's built-in tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement line and text should be native Blue Sky Plan UI elements, not drawn over the screenshot using an image editor like MS Paint.

integrity.description: Ensure the text file data matches the visual evidence.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Final_Safety_Gap_mm' value in the text file should match the measurement shown on the ruler in the Blue Sky Plan screenshot.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The minimum safety gap of 2.0 mm from the inferior alveolar nerve is a verified standard. The VLM must strictly check that the measurement ruler in the screenshot shows a value of 2.0 mm or greater.
